prompt: Edit image 1: Transform the text forms using the 3D blocky style from image 2. Apply image 3's high-contrast black and white aesthetic. Add image 4's anaglyph glitch effect. Incorporate image 5's interlocking textured structure into the typography design.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, the portrait composed of textual forms. Transform the individual text forms to adopt the bold, extruded 3D blocky style, including the sense of depth and distinct shadows, as seen in image 2. Apply a stark, high-contrast black and white aesthetic to the entire image, similar to the crisp definition found in image 3, ensuring no shades of gray remain. Introduce the red and cyan anaglyph glitch effect, characterized by chromatic aberration and channel displacement, as demonstrated in image 4. Finally, incorporate the interlocking, rounded, and horizontally striped textured structure into the typography design, emulating the interwoven appearance from image 5.
objects: Stark, high-contrast black and white aesthetic
Red and cyan anaglyph glitch effect
Interlocking, rounded, horizontally striped textured typography
